# Code Bonito

> Design template platform for developers and vibe-coders who want their AI-built websites to look unique, not generic.

## What we do
Code Bonito offers 100+ curated design templates for AI-powered development tools like Cursor, v0, Bolt, Lovable, and Claude Code. Developers pick a template, copy it, and paste it into their AI tool — instantly giving their project a distinctive visual identity. We're for anyone tired of AI-built sites that all look the same.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://codebonito.com/): Browse featured templates and understand the platform
- [Browse](https://codebonito.com/browse): Full library of design templates, filterable by style and platform
- [Creators](https://codebonito.com/creators): Info for designers and developers who want to submit templates
- [Pricing](https://codebonito.com/pricing): Plans and pricing for access to the full template library
- [Demo](https://codebonito.com/demo): Live demo of how templates work in practice

## Contact
Website: https://codebonito.com
